creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
I have a mental note to _never_ allow sleep whilst a VirtualBox guest runs. 

(I have never, with any version of FreeBSD, successfully woken the computer if a guest ran at sleep time. Always a panic.)

HP EliteBook 8570p
<https://web.archive.org/web/20150906211950/http://www8.hp.com:80/h20195/v2/GetPDF.aspx/c04163744.pdf>

IIRC I had the same problem with a slightly more modern HP EliteBook 850 G2. 

Crash info to follow.
